text.title: Reranking — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by latency budget + privacy + cost to {Cohere, Voyage, Jina, BGE local, FlashRank}.

decision-tree.root-question: Is first-stage recall@20 ≥ 80% on the labelled set?

branch.question: Does the data require on-prem / local inference (privacy, regulation)?

conclusion.verdict: provider=BGE local (BGE-reranker-base for speed, BGE-reranker-large for quality)
provider=Jina OR Voyage (lower per-call than Cohere)

example.trace: recall=0.85 + no privacy + 350ms budget + cost-OK → Cohere
example.code: recall_at_20=0.85 → q-privacy=false → q-latency=350 → q-cost=false → r5-fallback-on-outage verdict: Cohere Rerank + BGE fallback
